message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorFontSize 28
  ActorFontStyle plain
  LifeLineBorderColor black
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  MessageFontSize 26
  MessageFontStyle plain
}

actor Alice
actor Bob

Alice -> Bob : Sendet BT-MAC-Adresse per WiFi-Direct
Bob -> Alice : Sendet BT-MAC-Adresse per WiFi-Direct

Alice -> Alice : Abfrage des Radars

Alice -> Bob : Sendet Broadcast-Nachricht per BT

Bob -> Bob : Sequenznummerüberprüfung
Bob -> Bob : Filterüberprüfung
@enduml
